name: [UNIFIED] Tiered Model Router (Sub-Agent Runner)
_doc: Extends Freddy's sub-agent-runner with Shabbir's Worker Agent 1/2/3 Haiku/Sonnet/Opus pattern. Called by the main agent via the Expert Agent tool. Routes by complexity score: 1-3=Haiku, 4-7=Sonnet, 8-10=Opus. Input: {agent, task, context, complexity}. Output: {result}.

parameters.description: Search the web. Input: query string.
